global_rule: Old WP4-WP6 empirical artifacts and old WP7-v1 artifacts must not be cited as evidence of signal strength or weakness.

invalidated_artifacts.allowed_future_usage: historical audit reference only, with explicit invalidated_due_to_fold_coverage caveat
invalidated_artifacts.forbidden_future_usage: must not be used as the Stage03V1 fold plan or cited as evidence of signal strength or weakness

invalidated_artifacts.artifact_or_pattern: pre-RERUN1 original WP4 logistic_hazard_* empirical outputs produced from reports/stage03v/purge_embargo_fold_plan.json
invalidated_artifacts.allowed_future_usage: engineering-history reference only if clearly marked as pre-RERUN1 microfold-invalidated
invalidated_artifacts.forbidden_future_usage: must not be cited for model discrimination, coefficient reliability, readiness, or signal strength or weakness

invalidated_artifacts.artifact_or_pattern: pre-RERUN1 original WP5 calibration_* / downside_readiness_matrix / clustered_inference_summary empirical outputs produced from the 2014 microfold plan
invalidated_artifacts.allowed_future_usage: engineering-history reference only if clearly marked as pre-RERUN1 microfold-invalidated
invalidated_artifacts.forbidden_future_usage: must not be cited for calibration quality, usable probability readiness, or signal strength or weakness

invalidated_artifacts.allowed_future_usage: legacy engineering reference only; not final evidence
invalidated_artifacts.forbidden_future_usage: must not be cited as risk-validation evidence, downshift effectiveness evidence, or signal strength or weakness

invalidated_artifacts.allowed_future_usage: legacy engineering reference only; not final evidence
invalidated_artifacts.forbidden_future_usage: must not be cited as three-arm downshift evidence or signal strength or weakness

invalidated_artifacts.allowed_future_usage: legacy input-manifest reference only when explaining supersession
invalidated_artifacts.forbidden_future_usage: must not be used as Stage03V1 final gate input evidence

invalidated_artifacts.artifact_or_pattern: old WP7-v1 final gate outputs, if present, including any stage03v1_final_gate_report.* or stage03v1_final_gate_verdict.* without _v2
invalidated_artifacts.forbidden_future_usage: must not be cited as the accepted Stage03V1 final gate or as signal strength or weakness evidence

replacement_evidence_policy: Use RERUN1 full-scale artifacts and WP7-v2 final gate artifacts only for accepted Stage03V1 phase-one empirical interpretation.
